requirement_topic.en: ARSE / CEET Grid Connection — 220/380 V 50 Hz and Electricity-Deficit Context
requirement_topic.zh: ARSE / CEET并网接入——220/380 V 50 Hz及电力短缺背景
requirement_topic.zht: ARSE / CEET併網接入——220/380 V 50 Hz及電力短缺背景

summary.en: Togo's electricity sector is regulated by ARSE (Autorité de Réglementation du Secteur de l'Electricité), while CEET (Compagnie Energie Electrique du Togo) is the national distribution and supply utility. Low-voltage supply is commonly 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. Any grid-connected EV charging installation should be coordinated with CEET for supply capacity, metering, protection, and connection conditions, and with ARSE where the installation triggers electricity-sector authorization, self-production, resale, or public-service questions. Togo's grid has material reliability and access constraints; high-power public DC charging is therefore site-constrained, while lower-power AC charging for 2/3-wheelers, fleet depots, hotels, offices, or solar-plus-storage sites is more realistic in the near term.
summary.zh: 多哥电力行业由ARSE（电力行业监管局）监管，CEET（多哥电力公司）是国家配电和供电公用事业公司。低压供电通常为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。任何并网电动汽车充电安装均应与CEET协调供电容量、计量、保护和接入条件；如安装涉及电力行业授权、自发自用、转售或公共服务问题，还应与ARSE协调。多哥电网存在实质性的可靠性和接入制约；因此，高功率公共直流快充受场址条件限制，而面向两/三轮车、车队场站、酒店、办公室或太阳能加储能场址的低功率交流充电在近期更现实。
summary.zht: 多哥電力行業由ARSE（電力行業監管局）監管，CEET（多哥電力公司）是國家配電和供電公用事業公司。低壓供電通常為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。任何併網電動汽車充電安裝均應與CEET協調供電容量、計量、保護和接入條件；如安裝涉及電力行業授權、自發自用、轉售或公共服務問題，還應與ARSE協調。多哥電網存在實質性的可靠性和接入制約；因此，高功率公共直流快充受場址條件限制，而面向兩/三輪車、車隊場站、酒店、辦公室或太陽能加儲能場址的低功率交流充電在近期更現實。

standards_or_laws: ARSE — Autorité de Réglementation du Secteur de l'Electricité (Togo), electricity-sector regulation and operator oversight
CEET — Compagnie Energie Electrique du Togo, electricity distribution and customer connection
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality applicable to grid-connected EVSE
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are accepted under GB/T 18487.1-2023 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz, which nominally matches Togo's low-voltage supply. However, Chinese grid-operator approval, protection settings, power-quality assumptions, and urban supply reliability do not transfer to CEET or ARSE acceptance in Togo.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装依据GB/T 18487.1-2023设计证据、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信，以及当地电网运营商项目验收。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，与多哥低压供电名义上相同。但中国电网运营商审批、保护整定、电能质量假设和城市供电可靠性不能转移为多哥CEET或ARSE认可。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝依據GB/T 18487.1-2023設計證據、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊，以及當地電網運營商項目驗收。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，與多哥低壓供電名義上相同。但中國電網運營商審批、保護整定、電能質量假設和城市供電可靠性不能轉移為多哥CEET或ARSE認可。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters and project developers should confirm: (1) CEET available capacity at the specific site before selecting charger power; (2) metering, protection, earthing, and harmonic requirements for the connection point; (3) whether ARSE authorization is triggered by resale, public charging, self-production, solar-plus-storage supply, or concession structure; (4) input-voltage tolerance and surge protection for voltage fluctuation; (5) derating for high temperature, humidity, and dust; (6) backup supply or solar-plus-storage where charger availability matters. A nominal voltage match with China reduces one hardware risk but does not make a charger grid-ready for Togo.
gap.zh: 出口商和项目开发商应确认：(1) 在选择充电桩功率前确认具体场址的CEET可用容量；(2) 接入点的计量、保护、接地和谐波要求；(3) 转售、公共充电、自发电、太阳能加储能供电或特许经营结构是否触发ARSE授权；(4) 适应电压波动的输入电压容差和浪涌保护；(5) 针对高温、湿度和粉尘的降额；(6) 如需保证充电可用性，配置备用电源或太阳能加储能。与中国标称电压一致只能降低一项硬件风险，并不意味着充电桩已满足多哥并网要求。
gap.zht: 出口商和項目開發商應確認：(1) 在選擇充電樁功率前確認具體場址的CEET可用容量；(2) 接入點的計量、保護、接地和諧波要求；(3) 轉售、公共充電、自發電、太陽能加儲能供電或特許經營結構是否觸發ARSE授權；(4) 適應電壓波動的輸入電壓容差和浪涌保護；(5) 針對高溫、濕度和粉塵的降額；(6) 如需保證充電可用性，配置備用電源或太陽能加儲能。與中國標稱電壓一致只能降低一項硬體風險，並不意味著充電樁已滿足多哥併網要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the charger connects to the public grid: CEET connection approval and site-capacity review are required; ARSE authorization may apply depending on installation, resale, self-production, or public-service structure
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic grid-operator approval applies domestically and is not a CEET or ARSE substitute

source.publisher: ARSE — Autorité de Réglementation du Secteur de l'Electricité

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Togo's nominal 220/380 V 50 Hz supply is close to China's domestic baseline, but CEET site capacity, ARSE authorization questions, power quality, and reliability constraints must be resolved before shipment or commissioning. High-power DC charging should not be assumed feasible without a site survey and utility confirmation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 多哥标称220/380 V 50 Hz供电与中国国内基线接近，但在出货或调试前须解决CEET场址容量、ARSE授权问题、电能质量和可靠性制约。未经场址勘测和公用事业确认，不应假定高功率直流充电可行。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 多哥標稱220/380 V 50 Hz供電與中國國內基線接近，但在出貨或調試前須解決CEET場址容量、ARSE授權問題、電能質量和可靠性制約。未經場址勘測和公用事業確認，不應假定高功率直流充電可行。
